title: alibaba/page-agent
friendlyTitle: Page Agent lets users control a webpage with natural language
summary: Page Agent is a JavaScript/TypeScript library for embedding a natural-language GUI agent directly inside a webpage. It can control web interfaces through text commands without requiring screenshots, a browser extension, Python, or a headless browser, with optional extension and MCP support for broader workflows.
friendlySummary: Page Agent is a web library that lets people type commands like “click the login button” or “fill this form” inside a website.
whyItMatters: Product teams can use it to prototype in-app copilots, smart form filling, natural-language admin workflows, and accessibility improvements without rebuilding the whole backend. Developers should still evaluate privacy, permissioning, and model-control boundaries before deploying it in production.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help teams add AI copilots to web apps, especially for long forms, admin tools, and accessibility.
